category_sources: source_facts.description says ISO/Edinburgh-style Prolog interpreter; official GitHub organization describes SWI-Prolog as a comprehensive Prolog compiler and development environment.
display_name_sources: official homepage and GitHub organization use SWI-Prolog; source_facts.name is swi-prolog.
docs_sources: official SWI-Prolog site hosts the PlDoc reference manual and homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SWI-Prolog GitHub organization marks swipl-devel as the main development repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Prolog interpreter; official GitHub organization describes a compiler and development environment.
